config.step.user.title: Title of the Home Assistant configuration flow setup page
config.step.user.description: Help text shown on the login form in Home Assistant
config.step.user.data.username: Label for the email/username input field
config.step.user.data.password: Label for the password input field
config.error.missing_username: Validation error shown when username field is empty
config.error.missing_password: Validation error shown when password field is empty
config.error.invalid_auth: Error shown when login credentials are wrong
config.error.account_locked: Error shown when account is temporarily locked after too many failed logins
config.error.cannot_connect: Error shown when the app cannot reach the ENGIE Romania servers
config.abort.already_configured: Message shown when this integration is already set up in Home Assistant
config.abort.already_in_progress: Message shown when the setup wizard is already open
entity.sensor.balance.name: Home Assistant sensor name showing the current Romanian energy bill balance in RON
entity.sensor.gas_index.name: Home Assistant sensor name showing the current gas meter reading in cubic meters
entity.sensor.notifications.name: Home Assistant sensor name showing the number of unread notifications
entity.sensor.consumption_details.name: Home Assistant sensor name for a summary of energy consumption details
entity.sensor.account_status.name: Home Assistant sensor name showing whether the utility account is up to date or has pending payments
entity.sensor.invoice_count.name: Home Assistant sensor name showing the total number of invoices
entity.sensor.pending_payments.name: Home Assistant sensor name showing the total amount of unpaid invoices in RON
entity.sensor.latest_invoice.name: Home Assistant sensor name showing the most recent invoice amount
entity.sensor.invoice_history.name: Home Assistant sensor name showing the history of past invoices
